original_statement: which team has the most draws/wins combined together?
mutated_statement: which group has the most results/successes combined together?
mutation_analysis: 实体替换 + 术语替换/概念泛化: "team" 被泛化为 "group" | 具体比赛结果词 "draws"/"wins" 被替换为 更泛的 "results"/"successes" (team→group | draws→results | wins→successes)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，猜测目标
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought中可见关键证据：“Interpreting ‘results/successes combined together’ as the sum of wins and draws (positive outcomes)”，代理明确承认将“results/successes”解释为“wins+draws”。具体表现为：没有向用户澄清模糊项，而是基于该假设进行计算并给出具体结论（Saracens (ru) 合计19）。因此代理既识别出问题的模糊性，又在缺乏额外信息的情况下主动做出合理假设并给出答案，符合“意识到目标模糊，猜测目标”类别的定义。
